title: The Ghost of Her Past
summary: Chapter 24 of The Boy Who Never Stopped Trying is titled The Ghost of Her Past. Theme: He learns love must sit beside old pain.
sceneDescription: The ghost of her past becomes a cool memory layer, where old pain sits beside present love.
